zh_a: 痰阻经络可导致肢体麻木。
en_a: Phlegm obstructing the meridians can lead to numbness of the limbs.
zh_b: 风痰阻络可导致肢体麻木。
en_b: Wind-phlegm obstructing the collaterals can cause numbness of the limbs.

en_a: A peeled coating often indicates insufficiency of stomach Yin.
en_b: Scanty coating often indicates insufficiency of stomach Yin.

zh_a: 奇经八脉调节十二经脉的气血。
en_a: The eight extraordinary vessels regulate Qi and blood in the twelve regular channels.
zh_b: 奇经八脉调节正经气血。
en_b: The eight extraordinary vessels regulate Qi and blood in the regular channels.

zh_a: 心气不足可导致血脉运行无力。
en_a: Insufficiency of heart-qi can cause weak movement of blood vessels.
zh_b: 心气不足可使血脉运行无力。
en_b: Insufficiency of heart-Qi can weaken movement in the blood vessels.

zh_a: 心阴不足可导致虚热内扰。
en_a: Insufficiency of heart-yin can cause internal disturbance by deficiency heat.
zh_b: 心阴不足可导致虚热扰心。
en_b: Insufficiency of heart Yin can cause deficiency heat to disturb the heart.

zh_a: 脾阳不足可导致寒湿内生。
en_a: Insufficiency of spleen-yang can cause endogenous cold-dampness.
zh_b: 脾阳不足可使寒湿内生。
en_b: Insufficiency of spleen Yang can cause endogenous cold-dampness.

zh_a: 肝血不足可导致筋目失养。
en_a: Insufficiency of liver-blood can cause malnutrition of tendons and eyes.
zh_b: 肝血不足可导致目失所养。
en_b: Insufficiency of liver blood can deprive the eyes of nourishment.

zh_a: 肝阴不足可导致肝阳偏亢。
en_a: Insufficiency of liver-yin can cause relative hyperactivity of Liver-Yang.
zh_b: 肝阴不足可使肝阳偏亢。
en_b: Insufficiency of liver Yin can cause relative hyperactivity of liver Yang.

zh_a: 小便清长多提示阳虚寒盛。
en_a: Clear profuse urine often indicates Yang deficiency with exuberant cold.
zh_b: 小便清长多提示阳虚内寒。
en_b: Clear profuse urine often indicates internal cold due to Yang deficiency.

zh_a: 疮面红活多提示气血来复。
en_a: A fresh red wound surface often indicates restoration of Qi and blood.
zh_b: 疮面肉芽红活多提示气血来复。
en_b: Fresh red granulation on the wound surface often indicates recovery of Qi and blood.

zh_a: 小儿肺脾两虚可使咳喘反复。
en_a: Deficiency of the lungs and spleen in children can cause recurrent cough and panting.
zh_b: 小儿肺脾不足可导致反复咳喘。
en_b: Insufficiency of the lungs and spleen in children can cause recurrent cough and panting.
